message:
chore(beads): update issue tracker — close e-process monitoring, mark OnceCell bug in-progress

Updates to the beads issue tracker reflecting recent agent work:

- bd-b04za (Anytime-Valid Invariant Monitoring / e-process): status
  changed from open to closed — implementation complete with math note,
  e-process monitor, and tests showing valid detection under optional
  stopping
- bd-ar5hz (OnceCell get_or_init panic after cancelled init): status
  changed from open to in_progress — fix is being worked on (retry loop
  after cancelled initializer)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
